diff:
diff --git a/checkstyle/import-control-core.xml b/checkstyle/import-control-core.xml
index 1c07ec1..296e33a 100644
--- a/checkstyle/import-control-core.xml
+++ b/checkstyle/import-control-core.xml
@@ -88,6 +88,8 @@
     <allow pkg="org.apache.commons" />
     <allow pkg="org.apache.directory" />
     <allow pkg="org.apache.mina.core.service" />
     <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.test" />
+    <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.common.config" />
+    <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.common.network" />
   </subpackage>

diff --git a/checkstyle/import-control-server.xml b/checkstyle/import-control-server.xml
index 74f60c8..0d7d348 100644
--- a/checkstyle/import-control-server.xml
+++ b/checkstyle/import-control-server.xml
@@ -90,6 +90,9 @@
     <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.storage.internals.log" />
     <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.storage.internals.checkpoint" />
     <allow pkg="org.apache.logging.log4j" />
+    <!-- for testing: integration tests may import core server classes -->
+    <allow pkg="kafka.server" />
+    <allow pkg="kafka.network" />

diff --git a/checkstyle/suppressions.xml b/checkstyle/suppressions.xml
index ab80c1f..1a6279d 100644
--- a/checkstyle/suppressions.xml
+++ b/checkstyle/suppressions.xml
-    <suppress checks="ImportControl" files="BrokerRegistrationRequestTest.java"/>
-    <suppress checks="ImportControl" files="MetadataRequestTest.java"/>
-    <suppress checks="ImportControl" files="ApiVersionsResponse.java"/>
-    <suppress checks="ImportControl" files="(JaasTestUtils).java" />

excluded_defs.name: main
excluded_defs.reason: read: the requests subpackage in import-control.xml already has <allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.common.message" /> at line 176 — no change needed there

exploration_log.aha_moment: Each suppressed file is in a different module with its own import-control XML (server module → import-control-server.xml, core module → import-control-core.xml). The fixes must go in the module-specific files. The main import-control.xml requests subpackage already has the org.apache.kafka.common.message allow.

dead_ends.why_irrelevant: Already had the allow at line 176; no change needed

exploration_log.hindsight: Should have checked build.gradle for module-to-import-control-file mappings first to avoid looking in the wrong file.

alternatives: Add to each module's own import-control XML
key_decisions.decision: Edit import-control-server.xml and import-control-core.xml for the appropriate module-specific subpackages
key_decisions.reasoning: build.gradle shows each module uses a different import-control file; the suppressed files span 3 different modules.

search_sequence.action: Read suppressions.xml to identify the 4 suppression entries

search_sequence.action: find each file to determine its module
search_sequence.reasoning: Determine which import-control file governs each suppressed file
search_sequence.result: BrokerRegistrationRequestTest.java and MetadataRequestTest.java are in server module; JaasTestUtils.java is in core module

search_sequence.action: grep build.gradle for import-control file assignments
search_sequence.reasoning: Confirm which import-control file is used by each module
Understand what allows are present and what's missing for the server test files

search_sequence.result: security subpackage missing org.apache.kafka.common.config and org.apache.kafka.common.network

queries.justification: Rule compliance: uses only non-code concepts ('import validation rules', 'inline exception', 'allow list'). Pre-implementation: describes the refactoring goal.
queries.query_text: Remove per-file exceptions from import validation configuration and instead add the relevant packages to the appropriate allow lists so files pass import control checks without individual suppressions

queries.justification: Rule compliance: 'ImportControl' is the exact checkstyle check name appearing as a literal string in suppressions.xml. Pre-implementation: searching for all ImportControl suppressions.
Rule compliance: lists exact file names and package names from the changed code. Pre-implementation: a developer would search for these identifiers.

solve_notes: Added `<allow pkg="kafka.server" />` and `<allow pkg="kafka.network" />` to the `server` subpackage in `import-control-server.xml` to cover `kafka.server.ControllerServer` and `kafka.network.SocketServer` imports in server test files. Added `<allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.common.config" />` and `<allow pkg="org.apache.kafka.common.network" />` to the `security` subpackage in `import-control-core.xml` for `JaasTestUtils.java`. Removed all 4 `ImportControl` suppression entries from `suppressions.xml`.
task_text: Consolidate per-file ImportControl suppressions into import-control.xml allow rules. Remove the `ImportControl` suppression entries for `ApiVersionsResponse.java`, `BrokerRegistrationRequestTest.java`, `MetadataRequestTest.java`, and `JaasTestUtils.java` from `checkstyle/suppressions.xml` by adding the appropriate allow entries to the relevant import-control XML files.

test_selection.coverage_skip_reason: Auditor could not generate baseline coverage — see auditor report

thrash_preventing_defs.name: module checkstyle config assignments
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: maps each module to its specific import-control XML file; without this, an AI agent would edit the wrong XML file (e.g., import-control.xml instead of import-control-server.xml)

thrash_preventing_defs.name: top-level disallow kafka
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: the <disallow pkg='kafka'/> at line 38 means subpackage-level allows for kafka.server must be added inside the server subpackage to override; an AI agent needs to see this to understand why import fails

thrash_preventing_defs.name: security subpackage existing allows
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: checking existing allows in the security subpackage prevents adding redundant entries and shows what's already covered

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers the 5 places edited (4 in suppressions.xml, 1 server subpackage, 1 security subpackage). The thrash-preventing set adds build.gradle module assignments (to find the correct XML files without searching), the top-level disallow in import-control-server.xml (to understand why subpackage allows are needed), and the existing security subpackage allows (to avoid redundant entries). An AI agent would search for all three before implementing.
